message:
chore(gitignore): ignore one-shot Playwright debug scripts at repo root + .claude/

Recent debugging sessions on /writing/* pages and the homepage dropped
a bunch of one-shot Playwright driver scripts at the repo root:

    inspect.mjs, inspect2.mjs
    screenshot.mjs, screenshot-anchors.mjs, screenshot-final.mjs,
    screenshot-final2.mjs, screenshot-interact.mjs, screenshot-tour.mjs,
    screenshot-verify.mjs, screenshot-verify2.mjs, screenshot-verify3.mjs,
    screenshot-verify4.mjs

These are ad hoc "open localhost:3000/<page>, do a thing, capture a PNG
or JSON blob" harnesses that live for one debugging session and then
should not survive. They don't belong in tests/ (not deterministic,
not assertable) and they don't belong in the committed repo (rot the
instant the page DOM changes). Cover with:

    /screenshot*.mjs
    /screenshot*.py
    /inspect*.mjs
    /inspect*.py

anchored at the root so we don't accidentally hide a real
`src/**/screenshot-*.mjs` if one ever exists.

Also add .claude/ — matches the pattern ntm's .gitignore already uses:
Claude Code drops per-project lock files like
.claude/scheduled_tasks.lock into this directory at runtime, and those
should never reach origin. Consistent with how every other /dp repo
treats .claude/.

files.patch:
@@ -80,5 +80,14 @@ reports/
 # Debug scripts (local only)
 lcp-debug.mjs
 
+# One-shot Playwright debug scripts at repo root (screenshot capture, DOM inspection, tour recorders)
+/screenshot*.mjs
+/screenshot*.py
+/inspect*.mjs
+/inspect*.py
+
+# Claude Code per-project state (scheduled task locks, session metadata)
+.claude/
+
 # Stray numeric files (agent shell output accidentally captured)
 /1
